name: Exhibition Salad with Meringue Baked Pecans
recipeIngredient: salt and freshly ground black pepper
6 cups fresh radicchio, endive, escarole (6 ounces mixture)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
2. Butter a shallow 10-by-15-inch jelly-roll pan.
3. Beat the egg white until stiff.
4. Mix the cinnamon and salt into the sugar.
5. Keeping the beater running, add the sugar mixture, 1 tablespoon at a time.
6. Fold in the melted butter and the pecans. Spread the pecan mixture in the prepared pan.
7. Bake for 15 minutes.
8. Remove the pan from the oven. Using a spatula, carefully flip the pecan mixture one small section at a time.
9. When all the pecans have been turned over, return the pan to the oven. Bake an additional 15 minutes.
10. Watch them carefully—do not allow them to burn. Cool the pecans on paper towels.
SHERRY VINAIGRETTE:
1. Whisk together the mustard, sugar, and vinegar.
2. Whisking constantly, dribble in the olive oil. Add salt and pepper to taste. Makes 1/4 cup.
SALAD:
1. Wash, dry, and trim the arugula and the other greens.
2. Tear them into large bite-size pieces.
3. Just before serving, toss with the vinaigrette.
4. Sprinkle the pecans over the top and toss again.
5. Serve immediately.
Serves 4.
